meta.description: ReModa is an Icelandic online store for quality second-hand clothing for women and men. Unique pieces, sustainable fashion, shipped with Dropp.

announcement: Free Dropp shipping over 15,000 kr · Sustainable fashion from Iceland's wardrobes

home.subtitle: Hand-picked quality second-hand clothing for women and men. Shop sustainably — every piece is one of a kind with a story to tell.
home.saleSubtitle: Find great deals on unique pieces

footer.tagline: Renewed fashion from Iceland's wardrobes. Unique quality clothing given a new life.
footer.payment: Secure payment with Teya · Shipped with Dropp

product.shipNote: Shipped with Dropp to your chosen pickup point
product.uniqueNote: One of a kind — once it's sold, it's gone

collection.womenDesc: Hand-picked women's clothing given a new life
collection.menDesc: Hand-picked men's clothing given a new life
collection.emptyFiltered: No items match your search. Try clearing the filters.

cart.emptyText: Browse the selection and find something unique.
cart.title: Your cart

checkout.title: Complete your order
checkout.pickupHelp: Choose the Dropp location where you'd like to collect your order.
checkout.payNote: You'll be redirected to Teya's secure payment page.
checkout.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

confirmation.title: Thank you!
confirmation.received: Your order {order} has been received. A confirmation has been sent to your email.
confirmation.droppNote: You'll get a notification from Dropp when your order is ready for collection.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to see your orders.
auth.signupSubtitle: Create an account to track your orders.
auth.signupCreated: Account created! You can now sign in.
auth.notConfigured: Sign-in will be enabled once the Supabase project is connected.

account.title: My account
account.noOrders: You don't have any orders yet.
account.notConfigured: Accounts will be enabled once the Supabase project is connected.

conditionDesc.excellent: Little to no signs of wear

consent.title: Cookies
consent.description: We use cookies to improve your experience. Choose which cookies you allow.
consent.necessaryDesc: Required for the site to work. Always on.
consent.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how the site is used.
